--day-item/text-default.description: Day number color for Available (default) and today indicator states.

--day-item/text-disabled.description: Day number color for Disable (out-of-month) state.

--day-item/text-selected.description: Day number color for Selected - Start and Selected - End (inverted, light on dark circle).

--day-item/text-selected-middle.description: Day number color for Selected - Middle (dark text on semi-transparent band — NOT inverted).

--day-item/bg-selected-middle.description: Background color for the range band applied to Selected - Middle cells and the half-bands on Start and End cells.

--font-family/body.description: Font family used across all text elements.

--spacing-16.description: Container horizontal padding and title-to-grid gap.

notes: TODO: Confirm the design token for the Selected - Start / End circle background color.

Middle-of-range text uses --day-item/text-selected-middle (#1d1d23) — dark, NOT inverted.
Start and End text uses --day-item/text-selected (#f1f2f4) — inverted (light on dark circle).
